title: My Seoul Salaryman Budget: Cost of Living in Seoul 2026
summary: The cost of living in Seoul in 2026 for a single person typically ranges from ₩2,000,000 to ₩2,800,000 monthly, with housing being the dominant expense. While public transport and local food are affordable, initial housing deposits and frequent lifestyle splurges can significantly increase overall expenditures.

title: Why Koreans are ditching Seoul for Ulleungdo: Your next off-the-beaten-path Korean travel obsession.
keyword: Why Koreans are ditching Seoul for Ulleungdo: Your next off-the-beaten-path Korean travel obsession.
summary: Koreans are increasingly drawn to Ulleungdo, an untouched volcanic island, as an authentic escape from Seoul's intense pace, seeking genuine 'healing' and a connection to nature. This off-the-beaten-path destination offers a rugged, unique experience that provides a stark contrast to more commercialized tourist spots, appealing to those who desire a slower, more immersive travel ideal.
tags: Why Koreans are ditching Seoul for Ulleungdo: Your next off-the-beaten-path Korean travel obsession.
